/**

 * Type-preserving Box.copy generated by @SealedCopy.

 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values

 * val state: Box = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Box = state.copy(property = value)

 * @see Box

 */
public fun <T> snap.sealedCopy.bounds.Box<T>.copy(
    value: T = this.value,
): snap.sealedCopy.bounds.Box<T> where T : Comparable<T>, T : Any = when (this) {
    is snap.sealedCopy.bounds.Box.Filled -> this.copy(value = value)
}
